---
title: "Talks"
description: "Selected talks and presentation topics."
toc: false
---

## Selected Talk Topics

::: {.card-list}
::: {.entry-card}
#### Decision-Focused Learning Beyond Benchmark Settings
From optimization-aware training to deployable decision pipelines in real industrial systems.
:::
::: {.entry-card}
#### Constrained Predict-then-Optimize with Uncertain Constraints
Dual-gap regret and feasibility-preserving solver direction for constrained decision systems.
:::
::: {.entry-card}
#### Stable End-to-End Training Near Separation Boundaries
Variational free-energy and proximal updates for robust DFL optimization.
:::
:::

## Availability

For invited talks, panel participation, or seminar exchanges, contact via [email](mailto:shunyuwu@sjtu.edu.cn).
